form.formComment: At the latest run raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 12 at Ballarat Bm70 on April 3 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Markdel carrying 60.5kg at $19. The start before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a long-neck at Yarra Valley Bm62 March 15 over 1200m defeating Small Town Hero with 61kg at $11. Going well. Should be thereabouts.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.
Slow to begin. Raced three wide without cover.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 49-day let-up. Last start favourite; ran on from midfield and won by a neck at Sandown-Hillside 3yo Bm64 February 25 over 1500m on a rain affected track defeating Suze Spritz carrying 59.5kg at $3.20. Before that favourite; won by 2.75 len at Ballarat Mdn-Sw February 14 over 1200m defeating Incontestable carrying 59kg at $1.70. Progressive type who rates highly.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 2.75 len at Geelong Mdn-Sw March 14 over 1112m defeating I'm Da Boss with 57.5kg at $2.15. Last start favourite; came from midfield and won by 1.75 len at Kilmore Bm62 March 31 over 1207m on a rain affected track defeating Come Along Jeffrey carrying 58.5kg at $1.45. Profiles well and can win again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly, shifted out and bumped with Lady In Red.
Slow into stride.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 56-day let-up. Last start 6th of 10 at Caulfield Heath Bm74 on February 18 over 1600m, 4 len behind Mometz carrying 56.5kg at $41. The race before that faded in the straight second last of 7 at Pakenham Bm70 on January 29 over 1600m, 1.5 len behind Mometz with 59kg at $13. Others preferred.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced four-wide without cover.
Raced wide without cover until nearing the 600m.
Raced tight shortly after the start between Vail Mountain and Stormfront.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months ran on strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 9 at Pakenham Bm70 on April 2 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind Tuscaloosa Gem with 58kg at $19. Previously second-up 7th of 9 at Cranbourne Bm70 on December 27 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Laa De Sha with 60kg at $14. Looking elsewhere for the winner.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began only fairly.
Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.
Held up rounding the home turn and directed in to continue into clear running.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 4th in a small field at Pakenham Bm62 on March 26 over 1200m, on a slow track; 1.0 len behind Blue Bandit with 56kg at $8.50. Previously second-up got back early 7th of 12 at Caulfield F&M Bm78 on August 30 over 1400m, slow going 8 len behind On Display carrying 53.5kg at $16. Fitter  and some chance.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Comes off a 39 day let-up. Resuming sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 7 at Cranbourne 3yo Bm64 on February 20 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Blethyn carrying 59kg at $4.20. Second run from a spell tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 7 at Corowa Bm66 on March 7 over 1000m, 1.2 len behind Transactions carrying 56kg at $1.65. Shows promise. Respecting from a soft draw.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Last run made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 10 at this track Bm70 on March 25 over 1200m, on a slow track; 2.25 len behind Shaime carrying 54.5kg at $5. At only start last preparation 2nd of 14 at Ballarat Bm62 on September 19 over 1200m, head behind Runaway Soul with 58.5kg at $2.50. Solid return and can improve sharply.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: From the 100m, laying in.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign when last in a small field at Kembla Grange Cl1 October 13 over 1600m, 11 len behind Southern Prince with 56.5kg at $14. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.5 len Kembla Grange F&M Mdn September 27 over 1400m defeating Luna Bay with 58.5kg at $9.50. Have a few ahead.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping, shifted out and made contact with Think It Through.
On jumping bumped Miss Hvar.

form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of eight months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation ninth of 11 at Moe Bm64 August 24 over 1600m, soft track; 11 len behind Sweet Jasmine with 54.5kg at $8.50. First up last campaign fourth in a small field at Cranbourne F&M Bm64 April 4 2025 over 1300m, 2 len behind Prancing Queen with 58kg at $8.50. Inclined to see this one.

Approaching the 400m dipped and became unbalanced.
Held up from the 500m until passing the 300m.
